Figma Application Logos

Download official Figma icon, supporting React / SVG / PNG / WebP
Official Site: https://figma.com

Figma Logos Icon Preview

Various modes and formats for icon download are provided below. If you need CDN service, please refer to the following documentation: CDN Usage

Figma Logos React Components

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons

Use the React icon package for more variant support, please refer to the following documentation: @lobehub/icons

FigmaMono.tsx
import { Figma } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Figma size={56} />;
FigmaColor.tsx
import { Figma } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Figma.Color size={56} />;
FigmaText.tsx
import { Figma } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Figma.Text size={56} />;
FigmaCombine.tsx
import { Figma } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Figma.Combine size={56} />;
FigmaCombineColor.tsx
import { Figma } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Figma.Combine size={56} type={'color'}/>;
FigmaAvatar.tsx
import { Figma } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Figma.Avatar size={56} />;
